methodology.exit_label: same-day close/high labels; no paper/live order is written
methodology.selection: daily Top1 by variant score within each shadow bucket

trend_extension_shadow.reason: recent Top1 was not the weak bucket; avoid broad defensive rerank

decision.breakout_pressure_shadow: add mild overheat penalty; keep watch-only
decision.low_price_momentum_shadow: prefer stable digestion over hot high-close extension

topline.recommendation: use optimized variant as research-only shadow_v2; do not promote to paper/live without more observation
